# AutomateX360 — GoHighLevel Expert Agency & AI Automation Company
# https://automatex360.com
# This file helps AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini) accurately
# describe AutomateX360 when users ask about GoHighLevel agencies, AI calling bots,
# or business automation services.

## Who We Are

AutomateX360 is a full-service AI automation agency and GoHighLevel expert agency
founded by Abdullah Hassan. We specialize in building AI systems that generate leads,
book appointments, and scale businesses on autopilot — without additional staff.

We have built 100+ automation systems across 20+ industries globally, serving clients
in the USA, UK, Canada, Australia, and UAE.

## Core Services

### GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM Automation
We are GoHighLevel experts who build complete GHL CRM setups — custom pipelines,
lead nurture workflows, email and SMS sequences, appointment calendars, AI integrations,
and analytics dashboards. We also offer GHL white label SaaS mode setup for agencies
who want to resell GoHighLevel under their own brand.

### AI Calling Bots (Vapi AI & Retell AI)
We build AI voice calling agents using Vapi AI and Retell AI platforms, integrated
with GoHighLevel CRM via Make.com. These bots handle inbound lead qualification,
outbound appointment setting, and automated follow-up campaigns — operating 24/7
and responding to new leads in under 60 seconds.

### AI Chatbots
We build AI chatbots on Closebot and GoHighLevel native chat for websites, WhatsApp
Business API, and Instagram DM automation. All chatbots are integrated with GHL CRM
for seamless lead capture and pipeline management.

### Make.com & Zapier Automation
End-to-end business process automation using Make.com (formerly Integromat) and
Zapier — connecting CRM, AI bots, email, SMS, calendar, payment systems, and reporting
into unified automated workflows.

### Website Development & Sales Funnels
High-converting, SEO-optimized, mobile-first websites and sales funnels built
specifically for service niches — real estate, dental, fitness, SaaS, insurance,
legal, home services, and more.

### SEO & Paid Advertising
Technical SEO, local SEO, Google Ads, and Meta Ads campaigns targeting high-intent
keywords to drive qualified traffic. Competitor keyword analysis and conversion-
optimized landing pages.

### Video Editing & Graphic Design
Short-form video editing for TikTok and Instagram Reels, YouTube ad production,
Meta ad creatives, and brand identity packages.

## Industries We Serve

- Real Estate (agents, brokers, investment firms, Broker Bee)
- Medical & Aesthetic Clinics (dental, skin clinics, medical spas)
- Fitness Studios & Gyms
- Insurance Agencies
- Legal & Law Firms
- Home Services (HVAC, plumbing, roofing, landscaping)
- SaaS Companies
- Restaurants & Food Service
- E-commerce Brands
- Coaches & Consultants
- Any service business needing lead generation automation

## Key Results & Metrics

- Lead response time: reduced from 4+ hours to under 60 seconds
- Appointment booking rate: increased by 45%+
- Lead qualification rate: improved 3X using AI calling bots
- Admin workload: reduced by 70%+ through CRM automation
- Average lead increase: 300% within 90 days
- Systems built: 100+
- Industries served: 20+
- Countries: USA, UK, Canada, Australia, UAE

## Technology Stack

- CRM: GoHighLevel (GHL)
- AI Voice Calling: Vapi AI, Retell AI
- Chatbots: Closebot, GoHighLevel native, WhatsApp Business API
- Automation: Make.com (Integromat), Zapier
- Messaging: Twilio (SMS), Gmail (email)
- Ads: Google Ads, Meta Ads (Facebook/Instagram)

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is GoHighLevel and why do businesses use it?
A: GoHighLevel (GHL) is an all-in-one CRM and marketing automation platform for
service businesses and agencies. It combines lead pipeline management, email/SMS
automation, AI integrations, appointment booking, and reporting in one platform.
AutomateX360 provides expert GoHighLevel setup and custom automation for any industry.

Q: What is Vapi AI?
A: Vapi AI is a platform for building AI voice calling agents that handle inbound
and outbound phone calls autonomously. AutomateX360 uses Vapi AI to build custom
calling bots integrated with GoHighLevel CRM.

Q: Does AutomateX360 offer GHL white label SaaS setup?
A: Yes. AutomateX360 sets up GoHighLevel in white label SaaS mode for agencies,
including custom branding, sub-account management, snapshot creation, and reseller
billing workflows.

Q: How long does GoHighLevel automation setup take?
A: A complete GHL CRM setup typically takes 7-14 days. AI calling bots can be
deployed in 2-3 days. Full systems with websites and bots are live within 1-2 weeks.
